subject: Before tomorrow
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Republican National Committee Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
I need you to show your support for our next president. |

Friend, Tomorrow, you get the honor of seeing your work, your sacrifices, and your perseverance pay off. And I will be humbled to stand at President Trump’s side as the newly elected Chair of our Party. But I will also remember that we never could’ve done it without the grassroots of our Party. Thanks to your courage, the forgotten men and women will once again have a voice in our country. Before this great moment in our country’s history, I want to show our next president how many supporters have renewed their commitment for the 2017 year by becoming Sustaining Members. Please accept your Sustaining Membership for the 2017 year by making a contribution of $250, $100, $65, $50, $35, $25, or $15. We didn’t win this election by relying on a few big donors and special interests. We won because millions of hardworking Americans chipped in whatever they could to save our country. Millions of Americans giving $10, $15, $25, $60 proved to be stronger and far more powerful than a handful of special interests trying to buy the election. You helped show the world that when the American people band together, nothing can stop us. But now is not the time to stop fighting. Just because we won an election doesn’t mean our job is done. As your next chairman, I will fight to sustain everything we achieved in 2016, and set us up for an even bigger 2018 and 2020. I will fight back when the media distorts our message and deceives the American people. I will fight to ensure we have the best data, the best messaging, and the best ground game. But I can’t do it alone. It won’t happen unless the grassroots of our Party once again step up and lead that unity. I am compiling a list for our next president of all those grassroots supporters who have renewed their commitment for the 2017 year as Sustaining Members, and I’d be humbled to add your name. Please accept your Sustaining Membership for the 2017 year by making a contribution of $250, $100, $65, $50, $35, $25, or $15. Thank you, Chairman Ronna McDaniel Republican National Committee

name: Denise Feriozzi, EMILY's List
subject: RE: Details for the Women's March on Washington >>
body:
We elect pro-choice Democratic women who will fight for women and families. | [ ](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c712b/24c69fd9/fcf624a2/18ee7203/2134995116/VEsH/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/contribute/donate-to-emily?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=1+-+%0D%0A++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++&utm_campaign=WQENE122_digital_email_20170118_Marchdetailskick&source=WQENE122_digital_email_20170118_Marchdetailskick")
---

Peter,

Just a quick reminder that the EMILY's List community will be meeting up to march together during the Women's March this weekend.

I hope we'll see you there -- details are below.

March organizers have issued a list of what is and isn't allowed on site (the major ones are that only small bags are allowed and no signs with wooden posts). Here's a full list:

**[https://www.womensmarch.com/faq#whattobring](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c712b/24c69fd9/fcf624a2/18ee723c/2134995116/VEsE/ "https://www.womensmarch.com/faq?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=2+-+httpswwwwomensmarchcomfaqwhattobring&utm_campaign=WQENE122_digital_email_20170118_Marchdetailskick&source=WQENE122_digital_email_20170118_Marchdetailskick#whattobring")**

Look for a group wearing yellow EMILY's List hats and holding EMILY's List signs.

We're looking forward to seeing you on Saturday!

Thanks,

Denise Feriozzi
Deputy Executive Director, EMILY's List

_\--------- Original Message ----------
From: Denise Feriozzi, EMILY's List
Sent: Fri, Jan 13, 2017 at 10:15 a.m._
Peter,

The Women's March on Washington is fast approaching, and we hope to see you there!

If you want to show your EMILY's List pride, then come grab some rally signs and march with us. We will be meeting up here:
**Location:** The Spirit of Justice Park, located at New Jersey Ave. and D St. SE **([map](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c712b/24c69fd9/fcf624a2/18ee723d/2134995116/VEsF/ "https://www.google.com/maps/place/The+Spirit+of+Justice+Park,+Washington,+DC+20016/@38.8855577,-77.0101919,18z/data=!3m1!4b1!4m5!3m4!1s0x89b7b82a60d121b5:0x31bd98908693f3b4!8m2!3d38.8856106!4d-77.0093052?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=3+-+map&utm_campaign=WQENE122_digital_email_20170118_Marchdetailskick&source=WQENE122_digital_email_20170118_Marchdetailskick"))**
**Time:** On Saturday January 21st, we will meet at the park at 8:30 a.m. and depart as a group for the march promptly at 9:30 a.m.
If you see people wearing yellow EMILY's List hats or holding EMILY's List signs, you're probably in the right place.

We are so looking forward to marching with you and showing the world that women won't back down.

See you there!

Thank you,

Denise Feriozzi
Deputy Executive Director, EMILY's List

[](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c712b/24c69fd9/fcf624a2/18ee723e/2134995116/VEsC/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/contribute/donate-to-emily?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=4&utm_campaign=WQENE122_digital_email_20170118_Marchdetailskick&source=WQENE122_digital_email_20170118_Marchdetailskick")

|
# EMILY's List is a community of over five million members that helps elect pro-choice Democratic women to office.

subject: URGENT: Will you stand up for women?

body:
[](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fdd35/2a380d31/1428b34b/fedd60/1622335355/VEsH/ "http://www.maggiehassan.com/")
[](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fdd35/2a380d31/1428b34b/fedd60/1622335355/VEsE/ "http://www.maggiehassan.com/")
Hello,
Tomorrow, Donald Trump will be sworn in as the 45th President of the United States, and women across the country are fearful that their rights could disappear.
These fears aren't unfounded. Trump has made it clear that defunding Planned Parenthood, undoing _Roe v. Wade_ , and dismantling the Affordable Care Act are top priorities for his administration.
But if Trump and Washington Republicans want to rip away decades of progress, they're going to have to go through every single person who speaks up -- and the hundreds of thousands of people heading to Washington to protest Trump's anti-woman agenda at the Women's March.
**Will you let them know that you're with them right now?[Add your name to tell Donald Trump that you won't stand for policies that could roll back the decades of progress we've made for women's rights.](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fdd35/2a380d31/1428b34b/fedd61/1622335355/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZHU1ZKVFZFNUJUVVVsSlE9PSI6IiIsIkpTVk1RVk5VVGtGTlJTVWwiOiIiLCJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVmFTVkFsSlE9PSI6IjAzMjY0In0=/ "http://petitions.signforgood.com/standupforwomen?code=hassan&firstName=&lastName=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=03264&redirect=https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/201701-womensmarch-ja")**
We know that when everyone's voices are heard -- including women's -- we ALL do better.
With a new administration about to step into the White House, now is the time to speak out.
[**Sign now to let Washington Republicans know that you believe women deserve access to fundamental rights.**](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fdd35/2a380d31/1428b34b/fedd61/1622335355/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZHU1ZKVFZFNUJUVVVsSlE9PSI6IiIsIkpTVk1RVk5VVGtGTlJTVWwiOiIiLCJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVmFTVkFsSlE9PSI6IjAzMjY0In0=/ "http://petitions.signforgood.com/standupforwomen?code=hassan&firstName=&lastName=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=03264&redirect=https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/201701-womensmarch-ja")
Thanks for being part of this,
Team Maggie

name: Barack Obama
subject: If I can still count on you
body:
I'm counting on you to fight back Friend --

Before my administration comes to an end, I want to take a few moments to thank you for all the ways you've stood with me during my time in the White House.

Everything we've accomplished together these past eight years was only possible because of folks like you -- people who saw all of the challenges we faced, recognized that something needed to be done, and chose to be a part of the solution.

That dedication will be immeasurably important this year, and I hope I can count on you to stay committed. Because while 2017 will bring its challenges, the new year will also deliver a lot of opportunities for Democrats -- to build up new leaders in our party who will take the torch from me and help continue the work that we started together.

You've been there for me when I've needed you the most. I want to make sure the Democratic leaders of the future know that they can count on you just as much as I always have. So before I leave office tomorrow, can you pitch in $10 or more to help Democrats build for the future?

**If you've saved your payment information, your donation will go through immediately.

subject: If you're committed to President Obama's legacy
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the DSCC, dscc
body:
It's President Obama's last day in office and we're making every minute count to show we're committed to protecting his legacy. [](https://secure.dscc.org/page/m/3954edd8/2b07114c/468d2299/736840bf/4154338649/VEsH/ "https://secure.dscc.org/page/s/stand-with-obama?source=PT-20170119-Midnight_DS-ProsHV")
---
Friend - President Obama's final day in office is here. And so is our last chance to show him we're committed to protecting his legacy no matter what Republicans vow to do. **Millions of jobs. Marriage equality. Healthcare reform. Climate action.** None of it would have been possible without President Obama's vision and determination. [**Now we 're responsible for defending his achievements as we face a new Trump era. Friend, will you show President Obama you're in the fight to protect our progress?**](https://secure.dscc.org/page/m/3954edd8/2b07114c/468d2299/736840bf/4154338649/VEsE/ "https://secure.dscc.org/page/s/stand-with-obama?source=PT-20170119-Midnight_DS-ProsHV") Just yesterday, President Obama said at his last press conference: "**I believe in this country. I believe in the American people ... In my core, I believe America will be OK**." His faith deserves a response from Democrats everywhere that eight years of hope and change doesn't end now, that it continues. [**Friend, are you committed to protecting our progress under President Obama? Then add your name to stand with us before his presidency officially comes to an end >>**](https://secure.dscc.org/page/m/3954edd8/2b07114c/468d2299/736840bf/4154338649/VEsF/ "https://secure.dscc.org/page/s/stand-with-obama?source=PT-20170119-Midnight_DS-ProsHV") Thanks, Team DSCC
